invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破75（基于ATR 2.0128和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 75 (based on ATR 2.0128 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.085（基于ATR 0.0021和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.085 (based on ATR 0.0021 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short covering ends).
